hero.seoIntro: Welcome to the most comprehensive France travel guide for 2026. Whether you're planning to explore Paris's iconic landmarks, relax on the French Riviera's stunning beaches, or discover Lyon's world-class gastronomy, we've got you covered with up-to-date information, insider tips, and expert recommendations.
